title: Grid Interconnection Queue
description: US queue at 2,600 GW backlog. Median wait: ~5 years, some projects facing 12-year delays. PJM and ERCOT most constrained.
impact: Primary reason hyperscalers are pursuing behind-the-meter (BTM) solutions. ExxonMobil, Enchanted Rock, Solaris bypassing grid entirely.

title: Power Transformer Shortage
description: 30% supply deficit for power transformers in 2025. Lead times: 128 weeks (power), 144 weeks (GSU). Prices up 60-70% since 2020.
mitigation: Eaton ($340M SC plant by 2027), Siemens ($150M NC plant by 2027), Hitachi expanding VA/PA. Deficit expected to ease by 2030.

title: Gas Turbine Backlog
description: GE Vernova sold out through 2030. Siemens backlog extends 5+ years. Mitsubishi doubling manufacturing but still catching up.
impact: Hyperscalers using older aeroderivative models as bridge power. Order lead times pushing projects to 2028+.
source: Source: GE Vernova, Siemens Energy earnings

title: HALEU Fuel Scarcity
description: Required for most SMRs (Oklo, X-energy, Kairos). Centrus (LEU) only commercial US source. Could delay SMR deployments beyond 2030.

title: Regulatory & Permitting Risk
description: Ireland, Netherlands blocking new DC connections. Parts of Virginia restricting growth. Pennsylvania governor threatened grid withdrawal. NRC reviews for SMRs taking 18+ months.

title: Hyperscaler Demand Pullback
description: Microsoft froze 1.5 GW self-build and cancelled 2 GW leases. Only ~5 GW of promised 16 GW for 2026 actually being built. AI inference efficiency gains could reduce power needs.
mitigation: Overall CapEx still rising. Demand acceleration from Goldman Sachs revised up to 220% growth by 2030.
